UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOI, SUMMCO K. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIEDERMAYER, MARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 ELGIN PARK #6, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, **JUDGMENT ALSO APPLIES TO ALL UNKNOWN/UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.
DECLARATION OF CHARLES M. COLLINS IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOI, SUMMCO K.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOI, SUMMCO K. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIEDERMAYER, MARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES VACATED ON JUN-26-13 $3,977.00 RENT, $500.00 COSTS, $1,262.56 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,739.56, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( NO SASE PROVIDED. ENDORSED FILED COPIES OF JUDGMENT AVAILABLE IN ROOM 103 WINDOW 13 PICK UP BOX)
